productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Red Casual Heels
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The crystal embellishments on the forefoot strap makes this a fab addition to your party wardrobe. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic forefoot straps with crystal embellishments Raw silk footbed with a synthetic leather patch Outsole TPR outsole with grooves on the forefoot for grip Pencil heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
